languages.text: {n}Отхаркивая кровь, манипулус грузно оседает на пол.{/n} "Триасомата... сотворена. Нунциус во мне".
{n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."
languages.original_text: {n}Отхаркивая кровь, манипулус грузно оседает на пол.{/n} "Триасомата... сотворена. Нунциус во мне".

{n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn tose sangre y se desploma pesadamente al suelo.{/n} «El triasómata... está completo. Nuncius vive en mí ahora».
languages.original_text: {n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn tose sangre y se desploma pesadamente al suelo.{/n} «El triasómata... está completo. Nuncius vive en mí ahora».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡咳着血，重重瘫倒在地。{/n}“三相体……完成了。努恩修斯，与我同在。”
languages.original_text: {n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡咳着血，重重瘫倒在地。{/n}“三相体……完成了。努恩修斯，与我同在。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn s'effondre lourdement au sol en crachant du sang.{/n} « Le Triasomata... est achevé. Nuncius est en moi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn s'effondre lourdement au sol en crachant du sang.{/n} « Le Triasomata... est achevé. Nuncius est en moi. »

languages.text: {n}Kan öksüren Eogunn, ağır bir şekilde yere yığılıyor.{/n} "Üçyeköz... Tamamlandı. Nuncius içimde."
languages.original_text: {n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kan öksüren Eogunn, ağır bir şekilde yere yığılıyor.{/n} "Üçyeköz... Tamamlandı. Nuncius içimde."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hustet Blut und bricht zusammen.{/n} "Der Triasomata ... ist fertig. Nuncius ist in mir."
languages.original_text: {n}Coughing up blood, Eogunn collapses heavily to the floor.{/n} "The Triasomata... is complete. Nuncius is in me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hustet Blut und bricht zusammen.{/n} "Der Triasomata ... ist fertig. Nuncius ist in mir."

languages.text: {n}血を吐きながら、エオガンは重々しく床に崩れ落ちる。{/n}「トリアソマタは……完成した。ヌンキウスは、私の中にいる」
